name: Travel Planner
description: Search flights, hotels, and destinations. Get travel recommendations, check visa requirements, find points of interest, and build complete trip itineraries using the Amadeus Travel API.

tools_summary.name: search_flights
tools_summary.description: Search for available flights between two cities on a given date

tools_summary.name: get_flight_offers
tools_summary.description: Get detailed pricing and availability for specific flight routes

tools_summary.name: search_hotels
tools_summary.description: Search for hotels at a destination with check-in/check-out dates

tools_summary.name: get_hotel_details
tools_summary.description: Get detailed information and amenities for a specific hotel

tools_summary.name: get_points_of_interest
tools_summary.description: Find top attractions and points of interest near a location

tools_summary.name: build_itinerary
tools_summary.description: Generate a day-by-day travel itinerary for a destination

tools_summary.name: get_airport_info
tools_summary.description: Get details about an airport by IATA code

setup_instructions:
1. Register at developers.amadeus.com (free test account available)
2. Create a new app to get Client ID and Secret
3. The free tier includes flight search, hotel search, and points of interest
4. Set AMADEUS_CLIENT_ID and AMADEUS_CLIENT_SECRET from your Amadeus dashboard
_note: Amadeus offers a free Self-Service tier with real flight and hotel data. No credit card required for the test environment.
